name: Vivienda Social (INFONAVIT, FOVISSSTE, CONAVI)
description: Mexican social-housing context for the vivienda pilot. INFONAVIT finances housing for private-sector workers, FOVISSSTE for public-sector workers, and CONAVI sets national housing policy, subsidies and technical guidelines. The pack surfaces these bodies for project setup and keeps the universal completeness checks on; programme-specific budget and unit-typology gates are on the roadmap.
